tasks.label: [Rbot_v_24.7_brain][W] 🟢 Start Engine — 26k units | $45 hard stop | 30-min cooldown | Corr gate ON | Pure OCO 15/30
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Start the RBOTZILLA Rbot_v_24.7_brain trading engine.' && echo '  v5.0: 26k units | $45 hard stop | 30-min cooldown | Corr gate ON' && echo '  Pure OCO 15/30 SL/TP | 75% conf | Green lock + 3-step trail active' && echo '  Then: live tail of engine log (Ctrl+C to stop watching)' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/start.sh && tail -f logs/engine_continuous.out ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [Rbot_v_24.7_brain][W] 🔴 Stop Engine — Kills the running engine process
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Kill the running Rbot_v_24.7_brain engine process.' && echo '  Open trades remain on OANDA. Broker-side OCO + native TS' && echo '  remain active as safety net even while engine is stopped.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/stop.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [Rbot_v_24.7_brain][W] 🔄 Restart Engine — Wipes cooldowns + starts fresh (live tail)
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && bash scripts/stop.sh && rm -f /tmp/rbotz_clean_cooldowns.json && echo '' > logs/engine_continuous.out && bash scripts/start.sh && sleep 3 && tail -f logs/engine_continuous.out

tasks.label: [Rbot_v_24.7_brain][W] 🔥 Insert Phoenix ENV — Swaps .env to Phoenix config (auto-backup + rollback)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. AUTO-BACKUP current .env with timestamp' && echo '  2. SWAP .env to .env.phoenix' && echo '  3. Restart engine with Phoenix config' && echo '  ROLLBACK: Run Restore Clean ENV task.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) mkdir -p logs/env_rollback && cp .env "logs/env_rollback/.env.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" && cp .env.phoenix .env && echo '✅ .env swapped to Phoenix config' && bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [Rbot_v_24.7_brain][W] ♻️ Restore Clean ENV — Restores master .env from Desktop backup
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. AUTO-BACKUP current .env' && echo '  2. RESTORE .env from Desktop master backup' && echo '  3. Restart engine' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && if [ ! -f ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env ]; then echo '  ❌ Master backup not found. Run: cp .env ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env' && exit 1; fi && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) mkdir -p logs/env_rollback && cp .env "logs/env_rollback/.env.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" && cp ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env .env && echo '✅ .env restored from Desktop master' && bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.command: tail -f /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN/logs/narration.jsonl | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print(json.dumps(json.loads(l), indent=None)) for l in sys.stdin]" 2>/dev/null || tail -f /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN/logs/narration.jsonl

tasks.label: [Rbot_v_24.7_brain][RO] 👀 Watch Live — Opens 3 panels side by side
[Rbot_v_24.7_brain][RO] 🏥 Health Check — Process + broker + narration status
[Rbot_v_24.7_brain][W] 🔒 Lock All Code — Sets .py/.sh to read-only (chmod 444)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL set ALL .py/.sh to read-only (444).' && echo '  Running engine is NOT affected.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.py' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 444 {} \; && find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.sh' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 444 {} \; && echo '✅ Locked (444)' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [Rbot_v_24.7_brain][W] 🔓 Unlock All Code — Sets .py/.sh to writable (chmod 644/755)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL set .py to 644 and .sh to 755.' && echo '  Enables agent code editing and patching.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.py' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 644 {} \; && find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.sh' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 755 {} \; && echo '✅ Unlocked (644/755)' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. Create a dated SNAPSHOT_BACKUP folder in-repo' && echo '  2. Copy snapshot to ~/Desktop/' && echo '  3. Copy snapshot to ~/  (WSL home root)' && echo '  4. Git commit + push to GitHub (origin main)' && echo '  Safe — does NOT restart the engine or modify .env.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) SNAP="SNAPSHOT_BACKUP_Rbot_v_24.7_brain_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M)" && mkdir -p "$SNAP" && cp -r engine strategies brokers foundation util scripts .vscode .env "$SNAP/" 2>/dev/null && echo "✅ In-repo snapshot: $SNAP" && cp -r "$SNAP" ~/Desktop/ && echo "✅ Desktop backup: ~/Desktop/$SNAP" && cp -r "$SNAP" ~/ && echo "✅ WSL root backup: ~/$SNAP" && (cp .env ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env && echo '✅ Master .env saved to Desktop' || echo '⚠️  Desktop .env skipped (permission) — saved inside snapshot') && git add -A && git commit -m "Rbot_v_24.7_brain $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') — Daily+H4+M15 TF gates | Exhaustion filter | Fib+S&D confluence | Candle body quality | 50-pip trail | ATR trail infrastructure | Quiet hours 10pm-3am ET" && git push origin main && echo '✅ Pushed to GitHub' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [Rbot_v_24.7_brain][W] 🗑️ Close Single Trade — Close one trade by ID
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK closes ONE trade by ID at market price.' && echo '  Find the Ticket # in your OANDA platform Trades tab.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Enter trade ID (or Exit): ' tid && case "$tid" in [eE]*) echo '  Exited.' ;; '') echo '  No ID entered.' ;; *) python3 -m venv --system-site-packages /tmp/rbot_venv 2>/dev/null; /tmp/rbot_venv/bin/pip install websocket-client -q 2>/dev/null; /tmp/rbot_venv/bin/python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from brokers.oanda_connector import get_oanda_connector; c = get_oanda_connector(); r = c.close_trade('$tid'); print('RESULT:', r.get('success'), '| Status:', r.get('status_code'))" ;; esac

tasks.label: [Rbot_v_24.7_brain][W] 🚀 FULL LAUNCH — Split-Screen OANDA + Crypto (tmux)
tasks.command: tmux kill-session -t dualbot 2>/dev/null || true && tmux new-session -d -s dualbot 'bash scripts/restart.sh && tail -f logs/engine_continuous.out' && tmux split-window -h -t dualbot 'cd /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_COINBASE_CLEAN && bash scripts/restart.sh && tail -f logs/engine_continuous.out' && tmux select-pane -L && tmux attach-session -t dualbot
